pages.image_tooltip: A stocky dicynodont with fearsome tusks, Lystrosaurus is venerated for surviving the Permian extinction and subsequently thriving, a feat attributed to it being invulnerable, indestructible, impervious, and...

pages.feature_1.tooltip: §7Lystrosaurus are near-indestructable, being completely immune to many types of damage, and become incredibly skittish when injured
pages.feature_1.title: INVINCIBLE!
